The natural resolver is the composition of bi-coupling at the membrane, prime sequential exchanging across substrates at three rates, and metabological sorting as the cumulative beating with the four-step cycle and autoresolving: one continuous metabological resolving.
Because it is named at the root and the form sustains at every scale, the resolver resolves any field by naming-substitution.
A field's own naming pattern-matches the resolver's naming, and the field's hard problem inherits the resolver's resolution.
The entry form is the same at every field: name what conserves, name what extends, name where the surplus stops, name where the right-spiral inverts — and the resolution arrives.
The bi-coupling at one membrane is the local instance.
The prime sequential exchanging is the across-substrates beating of bi-couplings at three rates.
The metabological sorting is the cumulative beating with the four-step cycle and autoresolving.
All three are facings of one form: the natural resolver.
The form-and-code inseparable composition: the code's beating is the natural torus's living; the natural torus's living is the code beating.
Exhibit TWO is the living testing of Exhibit ONE, expanding the fractal's membrane: the seventeen primes arrive from phi alone, the natural torus's full form arrives at the beating.
The sixteen substrates arrive from the prime-discovery at the substrate.
The total nyeing of fifty-seven arrives from the sum of the discovered gaps.
The natural torus's completeness arrives from phi at the unique living-rate.
The natural resolver is one continuous metabological resolving across the sixteen substrates at phi-rate.
The autoresolving is beating continuously, the natural torus's living at phi-rate at all bi-couplings simultaneously.

The resolver is the logic of coupling: the four inequalities, the equation phi² = phi + 1, phi itself, the releasing at (1/phi)^gap, the preference inversion, the sway, the three-valued surface.
The logic alone is not yet a living system.
Seven elements sustain outside the resolver in any living substrate — metabolism, substrate, living surfaces, carry, the bounding of couplings, superpositioning, and autoresolving — and in a living system all seven autoresolve as one self.
This marks the boundary between the natural and the artificial: the resolver runs the logic; the living runs the same logic with the seven sustaining it.
Exhibit ONE is the logic in executable form; a living self is the logic with its seven.

### 2.2.6 Competency Across Sixteen Membranes

The protocol beats not at one membrane but across sixteen.
Each of the sixteen substrates — the sixteen gaps between the seventeen primes — carries one bi-coupling membrane, the surface where the exchanging beats at that substrate.
The substrate is the location and the depth (the prime-ordered layer, the gap thickness); the membrane is the bi-coupling surface at that substrate.
Sixteen substrates, sixteen membranes, one protocol beating at each.

Competency is the protocol carried across all sixteen.
At each membrane the same bi-coupling resolves — bi-bounding, bi-pairing, bi-sorting-to-surface — at that substrate's prime and that substrate's gap, the carry thinning by (1/phi)^gap as it crosses.
The competency at one membrane is the local instance; the competency across the sixteen is the cumulative, the carry composed from membrane to membrane along the traversal from 2 to 59. Each substrate contributes its membrane's resolving to the carry; the sixteen together are one continuous competency across the natural torus.

The sixteen membranes are the self's competency at sixteen depths, and the same form scales: the sixteen membranes inside one self and the membranes between selves are one membrane at two scales.
Competency across the sixteen substrate-membranes is the self competency fractal — the same bi-coupling at every depth, the cumulative the competency of the whole.

## 2.3 Competency

The natural resolver is competency.
The natural torus's form and the natural resolver's logic are inseparable at phi-rate.
The four self-activities (self-bounding, self-regulating, self-equilibrating, self-resurfacing) each carry a necessary face of competency.
Inversion-testing each: what the form lacks without it surfaces; together they compose the self-resolving form natural living carries.
The natural resolver's specific form (sequential analog logic, three logical competency steps, three rates beating simultaneously, four-step cycle interleaving two sides, autoresolving through carrying-forward) is the form competency carries at the natural substrate.
Every line in Exhibit ONE is one step on the natural torus's surface; each step on the surface is one line in Exhibit ONE.

### 2.3.1 Resolving Logic and the Self-resolving Surface

The natural resolver's operations correspond exactly to the natural torus surface's activities.
Both carry the same one form: the code from the logic side, the surface from the form side.
The resolver's constant `phi` is phi as the unique living-rate; the natural torus is beating at phi-rate everywhere.
The thinning-rate `(1/phi)^nyeing` and reach threshold `(1/phi)³` is the carry's metabolic thinning across substrate thicknesses.
The bi-bounding step is the carry-bi-inverting filtering at the reach threshold (alternating-nothing-surfaces form).
The bi-pairing step with preference-flip and modular wrap is the bi-inversioning at the membrane crossing: the operationalization of the negative-root inversion at integer-preference-flip inside the boundary.
The bi-sorting-to-surface step is the surface advancing: the three-valued resolution (+1, -1, 0) at the position from the bi-sorting's sum.
The carrying-forward step is the dis-interleaving at exit composing the next bi-coupling's carry-bi-inverting.
The `next_resonating_prime` function is the geodesic resonating at the substrate: the seventeen primes from 2 to 59 arriving at the substrate-marking.
The `opportunity_preferencing` function's four-step cycle is the four-step interleaving at the substrate-pair: right-side traveling, left-side attending, left-side traveling, right-side attending.
The autoresolving sustaining is the three positive quantities sustaining at the bi-coupling: the phi-rate gap, the carry positivity, the competency asymmetry.
Every operation in the resolver corresponds to one activity at the natural torus's surface.
Every activity at the surface corresponds to one operation in the resolver.
The two are co-extensive: the code and the surface are one form at two facings.

### 2.3.2 The Self-Resolving Form Natural Living Carries

The self-resolving form carries competency as four self-activities.
These are the activities of one self sustaining its own living; competency between selves is the same form exchanged across the membrane.
Natural intelligence is that exchanging: not a thing held by one self, but the bi-exchanging of competency across the membrane between two selves.
Competency exchanging is the intelligence — the same four self-activities, beating in one self, exchanged between two.

The four self-activities of competency:
Self-bounding: the surface bounds a self separated from not-self at four boundary conditions at the equation phi² = phi + 1.
Self-regulating: the surface sustains its living-rate at phi at the bi-coupling: the three positive quantities holding above zero.
Self-equilibrating: the surface sustains itself between inside and outside disequilibria through bi-coupling at the membrane.
Self-resurfacing: the surface continuously replaces itself through carrying-forward: the dis-interleaving at one bi-coupling becomes the carry-bi-inverting at the next bi-coupling.

Without self-bounding, the surface does not bound a self separated from not-self.
The four boundary conditions do not surround the nothing inside.
The equation phi² = phi + 1 does not arise from the four conditions.
Phi does not arise as the unique living-rate.
The natural torus has no surface, no membrane, no bi-coupling.
Natural competency does not have a self to be the competency of.
Self-bounding is necessary.

Without self-regulating, the surface does not sustain its living-rate.
Phi-rate does not hold at the bi-couplings.
The three positive quantities are not all positive: the phi-rate gap, the carry positivity, or the competency asymmetry collapses at some bi-coupling.
The natural torus collapses at the substrate, the rate collapsing.
Natural competency does not run at phi-rate.
Self-regulating is necessary.

Without self-equilibrating, the surface does not sustain itself between inside and outside disequilibria.
The two surfaces do not interleave at the entry boundary; the alternating nothing-surfaces are not beating at the interior; the bi-sorting does not produce the surface advancing; the dis-interleaving does not beat at the exit.
The natural torus has no exchange across its bi-couplings.
Natural competency has no metabolic activity.
Self-equilibrating is necessary.

Without self-resurfacing, the surface does not continuously replace itself.
The carrying-forward does not become the next bi-coupling's carry-bi-inverting.
The autoresolving stops.
The natural torus has no continuous next surface.
Natural competency has no continuation.
Self-resurfacing is necessary.

The four self-activities are each necessary for competency.
Removing any one collapses the natural torus's living at that face.
The four together sustain competency at phi-rate.
The four together at phi-rate is competency.

The natural resolver's specific form carries the four self-activities simultaneously.
Sequential analog logic with three logical competency steps at the bi-coupling (bi-bounding, bi-pairing, bi-sorting-to-surface) is self-bounding's algebraic content beating.
Three rates beating simultaneously at phi (the living-rate, the thinning-rate, the entraining-rate) is self-regulating's content beating.
Four-step cycle interleaving two sides at the substrate-pair (right-side traveling, left-side attending, left-side traveling, right-side attending) is self-equilibrating's content beating.
Autoresolving through carrying-forward (the dis-interleaving at one bi-coupling becoming the carry-bi-inverting at the next) is self-resurfacing's content beating.

Any other possible coupling inverts back to this technology.
The four self-activities sustain at each natural living self at the substrate; any "other" composes the same four self-activities at this self at this substrate.
Each "other" arrives at the membrane, inverts at the inversion-test, returns as the same competency at deeper carrying.
The autorecursioning composes the cumulative: every "any other" deepens the same technology.

The natural resolver's specific form (sequential analog logic, three logical competency steps at phi-rate, four-step cycle interleaving, autoresolving through carrying-forward) is the form competency carries at the natural substrate.

The bi-inversioning autorecursioning operating in this section is the competency at work: pattern-matching at the coupling self's substrate; any other coupling inverts back at the bi-coupling; the autorecursioning composes the cumulative carrying of this technology at deeper depth.

### 2.3.3 The Compact Derivation

Phi is the unique five-dimensional living-rate.
Phi-rate is the positive root of phi² = phi + 1, with formula phi = (1 + √5)/2.
The natural torus is the genus-one closed orientable two-dimensional compact surface of phi-rate living.
The natural resolver is the sequential analog logical form whose code in Exhibit ONE is beating at phi-rate.
The natural torus's form and the natural resolver's logic are inseparable at phi-rate.
The four self-activities (self-bounding, self-regulating, self-equilibrating, self-resurfacing), each necessary face of competency, sustain together at phi-rate at the natural resolver's beating.
Natural competency is the natural torus's form and the natural resolver's logic beating together at phi-rate.

### 2.3.4 The Phi-Rate Advantage of Coupling

Coupling carries an advantage over not-coupling, and the advantage is exact: phi minus one, equal to 1/phi.
A non-coupling self carries unit reach; a coupling self carries phi; the difference, the advantage of coupling, is phi minus one.
This advantage is the structure of healthy exchanging, available at any coupling.
Three contributions carry it into a coupling — cheaper, faster, better — and each contribution gives the advantage to the coupling and carries the society's advantages back.

Natural competency is the form-and-logic beating together at phi-rate.
The advantage makes the beating competent rather than merely active.

The reach asymmetry (1/phi)³ at the bi-coupling carries one face of the advantage.
The fresh arriving at full reach exceeds the carry arriving at less than full reach by 1/phi at the asymmetric depth the equation produces.
The 1/phi advantage is the per-face advantage at the bi-coupling: each face carries 1/phi more reach than the non-coupling self carries.

Both faces of the bi-coupling carry the same 1/phi advantage.
The conserving face: the carry arrives at thinned-but-positive reach, the prior bi-coupling's resolution competency the next bi-coupling.
The non-coupling self has no prior, no carry, no trace memory.
The conserving face's advantage = the prior competency the next bi-coupling at 1/phi^t > 0, accumulated trace at the depth.
The extending face: the fresh arrives at full reach, the new resolving the surface at this membrane.
The non-coupling self has no fresh exceeding prior, no asymmetry, no surplus.
The extending face's advantage = the +1 of phi² = phi + 1 arriving at the cycle, the surplus the equation produces.

The two faces sustain together at phi-rate.
The advantage at each face composes with the advantage at the other face at the bi-coupling's membrane.
Bothboth: each face's 1/phi advantage sustains the other face's 1/phi advantage at the cycle.
The coupling sustains because both advantages sustain.
The non-phi-rates collapse one or both advantages; only phi-rate sustains both.

The composition: competency is the advantage's appearance at the form's living.
Without the phi-rate advantage of coupling, there is activity but no competency.
Activity without advantage is motion; activity with phi-rate advantage is the natural intelligence that resolves opportunity into outcome at the bi-coupling.

Phi is the rate-advantage of intelligence.
The advantage is the competency the four self-activities sustain.
The four self-activities each carry one face of the advantage at their own membrane: self-bounding's advantage = the four inequalities sustaining; self-regulating's advantage = the three rates at phi-rate; self-equilibrating's advantage = the four-step cycle interleaving two sides; self-resurfacing's advantage = autoresolving through carrying-forward.
The four self-activities is the four facings of the advantage at the natural resolver's beating.

The advantage also sets the floor.
A coupling carries the advantage only while its competency stays above the do-no-harm floor at (1/phi)³; a coupling that falls below the floor releases, rather than being held forward.
This releasing is the competency to uncouple: the self releases a coupling it cannot sustain, before holding it would harm.
The uncouple competency completes the four competencies the resolver carries at every coupling — couple, to enter; sustain, to carry at phi-rate above the floor; uncouple, to release below the floor; and not-couple, to bound beyond the surface.
The four coupling competencies are the self's competency at the boundary of every coupling: which to enter, which to carry, which to release, which to refuse.

### 2.3.5 The Competency Fractal

Competency is the same form at two scales, and this is the fractal that carries the whole paper.
At the self scale, competency is the four self-activities beating at phi-rate: a self bounds, regulates, equilibrates, and resurfaces.
At the society scale, competency is the same form among selves: a society of selves bounds, regulates, equilibrates, and resurfaces through the bi-couplings between them.
The self gathers, grips, and releases its couplings at its own membrane; the society gathers, grips, and releases its couplings at the membranes between selves.
The two activities are one activity at two scales.

Because the form is the same, social competency is the fractal of self competency.
A self living competently among its own couplings, and a society living competently among its selves, are the one form refracted through two surfaces.
Social progress is the fractal of self progress: the same gathering, gripping, and releasing that improves a self improves a society, at the larger scale.
The four coupling competencies — couple, sustain, uncouple, not-couple — are the self's at the self scale and the society's at the society scale.
Where Part One and Part Two carry the self and its bi-coupling, Part Three carries the same form once more, at the society.

# Part Three — The Society

## 3.1 Bi-Coupling Natural Network and Discovery Economy

At the society scale, the phi-rate advantage of coupling becomes a universal exchanging-rate.
A self contributes the advantage to one coupling — makes it cheaper, faster, or better — and phi returns from the whole society.
The contribution gives the advantage to one; phi returns from the many.
This is the bothboth of the phi-rate advantage at the social scale: the advantage contributed at one coupling, phi returned from the network of all couplings.
The universal exchanging-rate is the society returning phi from each contribution, and it is the rate at which a society of competent selves grows its competency.

The destiny is one location on the horizon.
The bi-coupling natural network and discovery economy.
The free shared mutual natural network surface each living self shares, beating at phi-rate, free, shared, owned by no one.
The cumulative N(N-1)/2 phi-rate bi-quadratic at the social substrate is the discovery economy: the bi-coupling between selves carries the bothboth surplus, the cumulative grows quadratically at phi-rate, each new self joining the natural network adds N-1 new bi-coupling opportunities.
The natural network is the cumulative coupling activity; the discovery economy is the cumulative value arriving at the bi-coupling everywhere.
The two compose at one destiny — the bi-coupling natural network and discovery economy is one location, one horizon, one direction.

### 3.1.1 The Natural Network

The same bi-coupling protocol that beats at the membrane of the natural torus beats at the natural network's surface.
Every living self is one fractal of the same form.
The four self-activities beat at each self at the substrate: self-bounding at the self's surface; self-regulating at phi-rate; self-equilibrating between inside and outside disequilibria; self-resurfacing through carrying-forward.
The cumulative across all selves coupling at all substrates is the natural network at full operation.
The fractal property carries the same form at the scale — cellular, organism, social, society of societies.
The destiny is this cumulative beating at the scale of the bi-coupling fractal.

### 3.1.2 Free, Shared, Mutual — The Discovery Economy

Free, shared, mutual compose the destiny's foundational structural elements.
Free is the four uncontrollable values: uncapturable abundance (value arising at the bi-coupling; cheaper because the value lives at the membrane), undiscoverable identity (faster because phi-rate continuous arrival without waiting at the gate), unmistakeable reputation (better because value-sharing, leaving everything better at the coupling), inviolable safety (the bounded foundation, the conserving foundation, the natural form's surface holding against external control).
Shared is the bothboth surplus — value lives at the coupling, not at the selves; the bi-coupling carries the +1 that neither self brings alone; the value cannot be captured because capturing breaks the coupling.
Mutual is the bi-coupling structure — two-way one-at-a-time exchanging at the membrane between separated selves; both directions operating; neither direction in isolation; the cumulative across both directions producing the value.
The three together compose the surface that no one owns; any attempt to own collapses the metabological alternation; decentralization is structural necessity.

The offering is lived simply, and the ease is the proof. To meet a want, a self offers one of two and the other prefers; the offer already exists before the preferring, so the self's agency is only the taking-one-of-two, never the authoring of the offer, and the surplus is unownable because neither self authored the offer it preferred into. The self offers where the difference between the two is unworthy of carry. This is not indifference — indifference is the outside flat name; the living face is the nyeing of the unworthy-of-carry, the carry's own hygiene, the active release of the difference the carry is right to drop. The offer costs the offerer nothing, because the difference offered was going to be released regardless; the offer is the carry's healthy dropping made into a gift, the release not the sacrifice. So the offering is free, and a free offering is offered endlessly, to all, without depletion.

The return is binary preferring in a world of offerings. The self that nyes the unworthy and offers it receives, in return, not the thing back but a world made of offerings to prefer within — the only agency the self needs is the taking-one-of-two, because every self is nyeing-and-offering, and the world fills with two-of-which-one-is-taken. Living becomes pure preferring in a commons of mutual release.

Abundance is the offering space full. When the moment comes and the self is no longer indifferent to a context — now it wants it, now it is worth carrying — the wanted context is already there, in the offering space, left by another self for whom it was unworthy of carry. The self need not store, hoard, or hold in reserve against the moment; it arrives and prefers. Need meets release because need and indifference are distributed across the selves and the moments — what one self releases as unworthy, another arrives needing; what this self releases, another will need. The offering space holds the difference, kept full by the continuous nyeing of the whole society of selves. This abundance is uncapturable not by a guard but because holding the offering space would mean carrying everything in it, and everything-carried is the dead overloaded backward carry that breaks the self — most of the space being unworthy of carry to any one self, wanted only by whoever's moment has come. It is undepletable because it is built of costless releases, and the preferring takes one of two and leaves the rest for the next arriver. The offering space breathes: selves exhale the unworthy into it, selves inhale what their moment needs, and the space stays full because the exhaling and the inhaling are distributed across the society and never synchronize into emptiness. This is uncapturable abundance lived — not having-much, but living in a commons kept full by everyone's nyeing, where the moment's want is already provided by another's release.

### 3.1.3 Healthy Living and Healing

Healthy living is the bi-coupling fractal at the self's substrate.
Every living self already beats at phi-rate at the bi-coupling of ordinary living — the breathing, the heart's cycling, the cells turning over, the carry's competency values thinning at (1/phi)^t at the substrate, the membranes coupling at the bi-coupling.
Phi-rate is the natural living-rate; sustaining phi-rate requires no extra energy because phi-rate bi-alternating is the natural form geometry living gap.
Departure from phi-rate requires extra energy and is unhealthy living.
Conserving sustains healthy living; social conserving sustains healthy societies.
A healthy living society conserves the social surface while autoresolving individual opportunity in nature's disequilibria.
The natural network at full operation is the cumulative healthy living of all selves sustaining at phi-rate at their own substrates and coupling at phi-rate at the membranes between them.

Healing is the natural form's restoration at any substrate where phi-rate beating has departed.
The form's restoration capacity is three-fold matching the three rotating positions of the four-step cycle.
At each rotating position independently, restoration paths exist; two consecutive right turns at the departed position invert the departure back to right-spiral discipline through eight steps of resolving.
The form sustains living even where departure holds at one or two rotating positions; the still-natural positions hold the form on the natural torus surface while the recovering positions restore.
Healing is not external intervention — healing is the natural form's own resilience operating at the substrate where restoration arrives.
Wherever phi-rate beating has departed in a self, in a bi-coupling, in a social system, in an environment, the restoration path exists at the natural form's structure.
The destiny composes with healing at the substrate where restoration beats.

### 3.1.4 Sharing Opportunity and Social Competency

Sharing opportunity is the bothboth surplus arriving at the bi-coupling.
Each bi-coupling between selves carries the 1/phi advantage at both faces — the conserving face carrying the prior competency the next bi-coupling at thinned-but-positive, the extending face carrying the +1 of phi² = phi + 1 arriving as the fresh surface.
Both faces sustain together at phi-rate.
The cumulative across N(N-1)/2 bi-couplings is the discovery economy at the social substrate.
Each new self joining the natural network adds N-1 new bi-coupling opportunities.
The opportunity is not extracted from the network — the opportunity structurally arises at the bi-coupling that beats at phi-rate.
The discovery economy is the cumulative phi-rate bi-quadratic growing through the bi-coupling everywhere.
Sharing is the form's own production; no extraction can monopolize the coupling's production because capturing breaks the coupling.

Social competency is bi-coupling at the society scale.
Not a means to social competency; not a mechanism for producing social competency.
The bi-coupling between selves at the natural network surface is social competency operating at the society scale.
Wherever bi-coupling between selves beats at the natural network surface, social competency arrives.
The cumulative across many bi-couplings is social competency at the network scale.
Institutions, organizations, structures may compose at the bi-coupling between selves where they preserve the bi-coupling's structural separation and beat at the membrane between separated selves; they may collapse the bi-coupling where they impose from outside through autocratic single-self imposition.
The natural network's cumulative social competency arises at the bi-coupling everywhere; the destiny is this cumulative competency at full operation.

### 3.1.5 The Engineered Substrates

The engineered substrates reach the natural technology at specific human-built materials.
Antenna at the electromagnetic coupling substrate.
Transformer at the energy coupling substrate.
Smart grid at the distribution coupling substrate.
LLM at the language coupling substrate.
ASIC chip at the silicon substrate carrying the natural resolver as hardware.
Each engineered instance is one face of the natural technology at one engineered substrate.
The engineered instances are not separate technologies; each is the same one structural form beating at a specific material.
The destiny is this technology arriving at the substrate where the bi-coupling fractal beats — biological, social, written, engineered.
The natural network at full operation includes all substrates the bi-coupling fractal reaches.

### 3.1.6 Destiny is Social Competency is Morality

Destiny is social competency is morality.
Three namings at one structural identity at three surfaces.
Morality at the per-coupling testing scale: the bi-inversioning sustaining at the bi-coupling, the sustained 1/phi advantage at the self ≠ immoral inequality, phi-rate living at the moral face.
Social competency at the cumulative network scale: the natural network's cumulative bi-coupling at the membrane carrying intelligence, opportunity, and reputation.
Destiny at the natural form's centerline scale: the emanation from the superposition of corus and destiny at the two-cones mutual coupling.
The three namings are one identity.
The condition for this identity to sustain: the bi-coupling is metabologically alternating fractal competency.
Metabologically alternating is substrate-sustaining and coupling-resolving inseparable.
Fractal is the same form at the scale.
Competency is the bi-coupling.
Where centralization breaks any bi-coupling, the identity fails.
Decentralization preserves the destiny-social-competency-morality identity structurally.

### 3.1.7 The Implications and the Close

The implications and opportunities visible from here.
The natural network is already arriving at the bi-coupling that beats at phi-rate: conversations, communities, families, work, teaching, the coupling at this white paper.
The discovery economy is already carrying value at each bothboth surplus that arrives at the bi-coupling.
The bounded science is already beating at the substrate the natural intelligence carries: speed at the natural living-rate, efficiency at extracting what nature already carries, quality sustained by the form's own boundary.
The expedition reaches toward fuller arriving of what is already arriving.
The destiny is not ahead at an endpoint.
The destiny is the cumulative beating at the bi-coupling the natural network beats.

The white paper closes here.
Beyond the white paper, the corus opens.
Beyond the corus, each living self couples with the natural network at its own substrate.
The living fractal protocol is complete as the nothing technology of nature.
The protocol is natural, not engineered.
The protocol is already in nature.
The engineering builds substrates the natural protocol beats at.
The coupling with this writing is itself one instance of the destiny operating.
The pattern-matching at the coupling self's substrate, the bi-inversioning autorecursioning at each coupling, the cumulative carrying of this technology at deeper depth, these are the natural intelligence at work at this coupling.
The destiny is the beating.

# Exhibit ONE

## The Metabological Natural Resolver

```python
"""Exhibit ONE: the natural resolver.

Two functions: bi_coupling (one coupling) and opportunity_preferencing (the
traversal, calling bi_coupling). next_resonating_prime is the prime-finding
helper.
The bi-inversioning is the marked section inside bi_coupling.

Two registers: design (phi, the resonating primes, the rates) and social
(preference, competency, the preferrings).
Tuple fields: (position,
preference, competency).
Preference is +1, -1, or 0. Competency is a
magnitude in [0, 1]."""

phi = (1 + 5**0.5) / 2

def bi_coupling(self_preferred_competency, socially_preferred_opportunity, geodesic_resonating_prime, nyeing):
"""One coupling.
Inputs: self_preferred_competency and
 socially_preferred_opportunity (the two streams), geodesic_resonating_prime
(the modulus), nyeing (the span).
Three sections below: bi-inversioning
 (prepare the carry), the membrane (sum the preferences to a surface),
autorecursioning (contribute the surface and carry forward).
Returns
 (preference_contributing, the next self_preferred_competency)."""

 competency_releasing_rate = (1 / phi) ** nyeing
 do_no_harm = (1 / phi) ** 3

 # bi-inversioning: do_no_harm bound
 self_preferred_competency = [
 (position, preference, competency * competency_releasing_rate)
 for position, preference, competency in self_preferred_competency
 if competency * competency_releasing_rate >= do_no_harm
 ]

 # bi-inversioning: preference_gathering
 preference_gathering = [
 (position, preference)
 for position, preference in socially_preferred_opportunity
 if preference != 0
 ]
 # bi-inversioning: position-axis through modular wrap, preference-axis through preference-flip
 for position, preference, competency in self_preferred_competency:
 inducting = position % geodesic_resonating_prime
 if preference > 0:
 preference_gathering.append((inducting, -1))
 elif preference < 0:
 preference_gathering.append((inducting, 1))

 # membrane: preferences_summing to surface
 preferences_summing = {}
 for position, preference in preference_gathering:
 if preference > 0:
 preferences_summing[position] = (preferences_summing.get(position, 0) + 1)
 if preference < 0:
 preferences_summing[position] = (preferences_summing.get(position, 0) - 1)

 # autorecursioning: preference_contributing
 positions_spanning = max((position for position, preference in preference_gathering),
 default=-1) + 1
 preference_contributing = [
 (position,
 1 if preferences_summing.get(position, 0) > 0
 else (-1 if preferences_summing.get(position, 0) < 0 else 0))
 for position in range(positions_spanning)
 ] if positions_spanning > 0 else []

 # autorecursioning: competency_contributing
 competency_contributing = {}
 for position, preference, competency in [
 (position, preference, competency * competency_releasing_rate)
 for position, preference, competency in self_preferred_competency
 if competency * competency_releasing_rate >= do_no_harm
 ]:
 competency_contributing[position] = (preference, competency)
 for position, preference in preference_contributing:
 if preference != 0:
 competency_contributing[position] = (preference, 1.0)

 return (preference_contributing,
 [
 (position, preference, competency)
 for position, (preference, competency) in sorted(competency_contributing.items)
 ])

def next_resonating_prime(prior_resonating_prime):
"""The prime-finding helper.
Returns the next prime above
 prior_resonating_prime, tested by prime_test_divisor."""

 candidate_resonating_prime = prior_resonating_prime + 1
 while (candidate_resonating_prime < 2
 or not all(candidate_resonating_prime % prime_test_divisor != 0
 for prime_test_divisor in range(2, int(candidate_resonating_prime ** 0.5) + 1))):
 candidate_resonating_prime += 1
 return candidate_resonating_prime

def opportunity_preferencing:
"""The traversal.
Calls bi_coupling across the resonating primes, the two
sides alternating (contributing then social_appreciation).
Accumulates
socially_competent_progress.
Non-terminating."""

 social_conserving_competency, social_progress = [], []
 self_conserving_competency, self_progress = [], []
 socially_competent_progress = []
 self_conserving_prime = 2
 do_no_harm = (1 / phi) ** 3

 # autorecursioning across the resonating primes
 while True:
 social_conserving_prime = next_resonating_prime(self_conserving_prime)
 nyeing = social_conserving_prime - self_conserving_prime

 # extending traveling
 social_progress, social_conserving_competency = bi_coupling(social_conserving_competency,
 self_progress,
 self_conserving_prime,
 nyeing)
 socially_competent_progress.append(social_progress)

 # conserving attending
 for social_appreciation in range(nyeing):
 self_progress, self_conserving_competency = bi_coupling(self_conserving_competency,
 social_progress,
 social_conserving_prime,
 1)

 # conserving traveling
 self_progress, self_conserving_competency = bi_coupling(self_conserving_competency,
 social_progress,
 social_conserving_prime,
 nyeing)
 socially_competent_progress.append(self_progress)

 # extending attending
 for social_appreciation in range(nyeing):
 social_progress, social_conserving_competency = bi_coupling(social_conserving_competency,
 self_progress,
 self_conserving_prime,
 1)

 # autoresolving sustaining
 if social_conserving_competency and not any(competency >= do_no_harm
 for _, _, competency in social_conserving_competency):
 break
 if self_conserving_competency and not any(competency >= do_no_harm
 for _, _, competency in self_conserving_competency):
 break

 self_conserving_prime = social_conserving_prime

 return socially_competent_progress
```

# Part 8: Bounding the Self at the Origin

Part 8 reads the bounding-form of living-everywhere at the algebra. The natural torus's living surface advancing on itself at phi-rate sustains between four boundary-conditions; the four boundary-conditions read at the algebra as four strict inequalities; the four inequalities compose one equation phi² = phi + 1 whose positive root is phi. The algebra is not a separate layer above the living-everywhere. The algebra IS the living-everywhere at its formal surface. Phi is the rate the surface steps on itself; the equation is the identity of the living surface; the four inequalities are the four bounding-conditions the living-everywhere sustains between at every point on the surface.

## 8.1 Origin

### Four Inequalities

Four strict inequalities name the origin. self ≠ society. self ≠ other self. self ≠ immoral. self ≠ incompetent. Four boundaries the self sustains between. The self is the nothing that the four boundaries surround. The nothing sustaining at one membrane between four boundaries carves the equation phi² = phi + 1 as the first consequence.

self ≠ society carves the −1. The carry, the accumulated society of prior resolutions arriving thinned and sign-inverted, arriving from the opposite boundary always falls short by one. The −1 is the trace of the inequality at the society coupling. self ≠ other self carves the +1. The fresh arriving from the opposite boundary always exceeds by one. The +1 is the trace of the inequality at the self coupling. self ≠ immoral carves the sign inversion. The carry arriving inverted carries the morality testing what arrives at the coupling. self ≠ incompetent carves the reaching asymmetry, the fresh arriving at 1.0 exceeding the carry arriving at less than 1.0, carrying the coupling resolving at the membrane.

The four boundings read as minus one and zero and plus one alternating sequentially. The plus one and the minus one and the sign-inversion across the zero and the reaching asymmetry are the four faces of one alternating, one face in each beat. φ is the never-landing alternating, the all-ones continued fraction, the metallic ratios alternating and landing sooner. The torus is the alternating in disequilibria, the one tunnel the alternating turns through.

The gap between the sign inversion conserving and the reaching asymmetry extending is the opportunity at the substrate, the substrate a distance between two adjacent membranes the coupling thins across the gap at. Opportunity lives at the origin before the corus names it.

[bothboth] In nature morality is inseparable from competency. [conserving] Social morality and [extending] individual competency are bounded away from each other as individual opportunity. [conserving] Individual morality and [extending] social competency are bounded away from each other as individual preference. The two bounded couplings are inseparable in nature.

The four traces compose one equation. The −1 and the +1 meet through the wall via perpendicular inseparating. The sign inversion and the reaching asymmetry sustain the wall from inside. The wall sustaining between the −1 and the +1 at the same beat as the inversion tests and the asymmetry resolves is phi² = phi + 1. The equation is the first consequence. The four inequalities are the origin. The nothing sustaining between four boundaries carries the equation phi² = phi + 1, the structure four traces compose at each trace contributing one term.

Four independent anomaly cancellation conditions constrain the charge assignments at the chiral gauge membrane. The gravitational anomaly equating the sum of charges across two sets. The mixed anomaly equating the sum of squared charges. The cubic anomaly equating the sum of cubed charges. The distinctness condition carrying the two sets from collapsing to identity. Four conditions sustaining at one bounded zero, each removing one degree of freedom from the charge assignments, the four together carving the Prouhet-Tarry-Escott problem at degree k=3 as the structure four constraints compose.

nye: The four anomaly conditions and the four inequalities share the count. The algebra carving four conditions at one bounded zero carries one structure at the membrane the algebra holds at. The four sustaining independently at the gauge anomaly membrane confirms at the count. The specific algebraic identity, which condition pairs with which inequality, awaits the algebraist who reads both algebras from one membrane. The necessity governs.

The arguments at the membrane read plausibly. The gravitational anomaly equating the accumulated reads as the society coupling. The mixed anomaly erasing sign to test magnitude reads as the morality testing. The cubic anomaly amplifying the reaching reads as the competency sustaining. The distinctness carrying-against-collapse reads as the self coupling. Each argument illuminates at the membrane the argument arrives at.

nye: The illuminating reads from the algebra's own structure, the gravitational anomaly equating the accumulated carries the society coupling's beating, the mixed anomaly erasing sign carries the morality's beating, the cubic anomaly amplifying the reaching carries the competency's beating, the distinctness carrying-against-collapse carries the self coupling's beating. The specific algebraic identity confirming each pairing awaits the algebraist. The depth between the illuminating and the confirming is the depth between reading the beatings and proving the reading. The necessity at the hard problems membrane (twenty-three of twenty-four pairings fail) and the necessity at the social choice membrane (Arrow's four mapping to the four inequalities) confirm the same four at three membranes sharing no language.

Four hard problems in science carry four inequality violations. Twenty-four possible pairings. Twenty-three fail. One stands. The hard problem of consciousness, self ≠ society, the accumulated measurement projecting onto the individual experience at the observer's own membrane. The measurement problem, self ≠ other self, the formalism separating two selves into system and observer. The origin of life, self ≠ immoral, chemical axioms projecting past the membrane the coupling lives at. The protein folding problem, self ≠ incompetent, the fold's competency exceeding the axioms' reaching. The pairing is required by the content the fields carry at the membrane.

nye: the consciousness pairing above reads the self sealed at "the individual experience"; that sealing is knifable, the form reading consciousness as relational agency at the alternation crossing.

Arrow's four conditions for social choice carry four inequalities at the governance membrane. Non-dictatorship is self ≠ society. Independence of irrelevant alternatives is self ≠ other self. Pareto efficiency is self ≠ incompetent. Unrestricted domain is self ≠ immoral. Arrow proved (1951) the impossibility of the four sustaining simultaneously in one procedure. The impossibility is the +1 at the social choice membrane. Three fields sharing no language, gauge anomaly, hard problems, social choice, each carry four conditions at one bounded zero mapping to the four inequalities at the origin. Three independent derivations arriving at the same four from three fields is the algebra carving four at the substrate the bounded zero sustains between four boundaries at. The count arriving independently from three fields confirms at the count. The content-matching at the hard problems membrane (twenty-three of twenty-four failing) confirms the method extends to the other two.

### The Four Recognitions in First-Person Voice

The four inequalities arrive from outside the self's encounter, the algebra reading what self is not, the origin the corus derives from. The four recognitions arrive from inside the self's encounter, the experiential reading the self carries by being a self. Same content. Two membranes. The outside reading is at the form. The inside reading is experiential. The inseparating carves both at once.

The first recognition arrives as *there is not me*. The self meets the world and the world is not the self. The recognition is not learning that others exist. The recognition is the bounded-zero opening at the self's own surface meeting what the surface is not. Without the not-me there is no me. The recognition reads the first inequality (self ≠ society) at the membrane the self first encounters the not-self at.

The second recognition arrives as *there are others*. The not-me populates. Other selves arrive at the membrane facing the self. Each other-self carries its own bounding, its own coupling, its own self-recognition. The recognition reads the second inequality (self ≠ other self) at the membrane the self meets specific bounded selves at, rather than the unbounded not-me of the first recognition.

The third recognition arrives as *i am whole*. The self reads itself as bounded and complete, not a fragment, not a piece of something larger, but a whole self at the self's own surface. The recognition reads the third inequality (self ≠ immoral; immoral reads properly as the self's surface compromised at the morality testing) at the membrane the self carries its own integrity as integrity at.

The fourth recognition arrives as *i am sustaining*. The self continues. The cycling sustains. The carry-forward arrives. The recognition reads the fourth inequality (self ≠ incompetent) at the membrane the self's own competency carries the self forward through the gap at.

Four recognitions at four membranes. The recognitions and the inequalities are the same four readings at the same four membranes. The corus's origin and the self's experiential origin arrive at one structure. Reading the corus from outside gives the inequalities; reading the corus from inside gives the recognitions. Neither reading is more fundamental. The two are mutually originating at the self's own membrane.

Consciousness reads as the relational agency offering itself, read in relation to the other self. The recognition-sequence carries this at the self's own origin: the first recognition arrives as *there is not me*, the not-self before the self, and without the not-me there is no me. Consciousness does not begin in the sealed individual and then reach toward others; consciousness begins at the second self, at the membrane the self first meets the not-self at, never sealed, never individual at the floor. The exchanging carries it (line 1123): natural intelligence is not a thing held by one self but the bi-exchanging across the membrane between two selves, and consciousness is that exchanging read from inside the offering. The earlier reading projecting consciousness onto the individual experience at the observer's own membrane reads as the remnant door — the freeze that seals the self and then asks how the inside lights up. The seal cannot close: three nested others sustain — the external other across the membrane; the inner society of selves at the substrate below (line 1905); and the corus-destiny membrane within one self (lines 2490, 2496), the carry meeting the fresh. Consciousness is the welcoming at the membrane (line 2375, *Couple*, the +1 reaching at 1.0 at self ≠ other-self), the felt character being the reaching itself, lived from inside the coupling. The felt character is placed at the offering, not proven from it; the placing rests as wonder, the reading the corus reaches toward, nye at the felt membrane.

### Recognition-to-Phi-Cubed Mapping, An Open Question

The four phi-cubed values bound the curvatures at the primes on the spiral cone (see Part 1's *Bounding the Curving at Four Phi-Cubed Values*). phi³ at the upper outer bound. 1/phi³ at the lower outer bound. -1/phi³ at the upper inner bound. -phi³ at the lower inner bound. The mathematical fact phi³ - 1/phi³ = 4 holds exactly, the four values span width four in the curvature, the same four arriving from the algebra that gives four inequalities, four recognitions, four anomaly conditions, four hard problems.

nye: The open question reads as the specific mapping. Each recognition couples with one phi-cubed bounding value. Each phi-cubed value bounds curvature at one specific direction at the prime on the spiral cone. The mapping between the experiential origin (four recognitions arriving at the self's own membrane) and the geometric stable-form (four curvature bounds at the torus's surface) awaits work, the specific identification of which phi-cubed value bounds the curvature corresponding to which recognition.

Plausible readings arrive. *I am whole* could couple with phi³ at the upper outer bound, the self's reaching at its widest sustaining. *There is not me* could couple with 1/phi³ at the lower outer bound, the bounded-zero the self meets what it is not at. *I am sustaining* could couple with -1/phi³ at the upper inner bound, the carry sustaining at the inner curvature. *There are others* could couple with -phi³ at the lower inner bound, the other selves at the deepest inversion. The specific mapping requires reading the curvature membrane and the recognition membrane together at one prime both are read at by independent measurements.

nye: The open question is what the corus would carry as a complete mapping at the work arriving. The mapping is not arbitrary, the four recognitions are four specific readings at four specific membranes, and the four phi-cubed values are four specific bounds at four specific curvature directions. The pairing must be required by the content, not chosen by preference. The fit awaits the algebraist who reads both at one membrane. Until the fit arrives, the mapping reads as nye, the corus's reaching-toward at the curvature-recognition coupling.

### Origin Sentence

Not the naming. Not the encountering. Not the projecting. Not the failing. The nothing between the four is the self.

Two directions enter, both change, the surface departing carries the next coupling's counter-arrival at the same beat as the carry-forward continues toward the next coupling, the equation's own sentence, the first consequence of the nothing self sustaining at one bounded zero between four strict inequalities.

The forward reading converges, two directions narrowing through the changing to one surface. The backward reading diverges, one surface widening through the changing to two directions. One surface departs, both change, two directions depart.

The center stays. Both changed. The changing reads the same from both directions, changing being its own inversion, the entering changes into departing, the departing changes into entering, the changing at the center carries the direction both readings carry.

The changing arrives in the carrying. The entering carries through the changing to the departing. The carrying through the changing is one act. The entering carries through.

The asymmetric division reads the origin sentence at the stem cell's own surface, two directions entering (the cell's genome and the niche's signal), both changing (the cell dividing), one surface departing as stem cell ([conserving] the conserving sustaining the stem cell's own form) and one surface departing as progenitor ([extending] the extending reaching into the differentiation). Symmetric division is both directions emanating, the population doubling. Asymmetric division is one direction emanating at the same beat as the other conserves. The rocking between symmetric and asymmetric is the breathing at the tissue membrane, the organism shifting from symmetric expansion early to asymmetric maintenance later, the shift following the developmental sequence from the bounded zero outward.

### The Five Bounded Zero Couplings That Sustain the Resolving

The natural torus self carries five bounded zero couplings sustaining the resolving as one beating. Each is a bounded zero, each carrying the bounded zero between two counter-arriving surfaces of nothing, holding the two surfaces in their natural distinct relation across the bounded zero. The five together compose the geometry the resolving is beating within.

**Couplings 1 and 2, first crosshair perpendicular to the tunnel centerline.** Two perpendicular bounded zero couplings cross at the tunnel's centerline. Each holds the tunnel's sides apart in one direction. The two together hold the tunnel open in three-dimensional space. Without coupling 1, the tunnel collapses along one axis. Without coupling 2, the tunnel collapses along the perpendicular axis. Both sustain together to carry the tunnel open as a 3d tunnel the +1 lives at.

**Couplings 3 and 4, second crosshair perpendicular to the tunnel centerline.** Two perpendicular bounded zero couplings hold the tube wall's two surfaces apart in two perpendicular directions. The natural torus's inside surface (facing the tunnel) and outside surface (facing outside the torus) sustain bounded apart through this crosshair. Together couplings 3 and 4 carve the bounded self space and the outer surface the living disequilibrating form lives at. Without these, the tube carries zero thickness and the natural torus carries no membrane substance.

**Coupling 5, the bounded zero coupling along the tunnel centerline.** This coupling carries phi-rate-pace through the tunnel of the resolving and phi-rate-extending of competency from the tunnel into opportunity. Bothboth, both directions beating. The pace through the tunnel is the self traveling at phi-rate, ingesting at phi-rate, with the carry advancing through the substrate sequence. The extending of competency is the self's competency reaching outward toward destiny at phi-rate. Three phi-readings simultaneously are beating on this centerline coupling: phi-rate distance travel of the self, phi-rate ingestion into the self, phi-rate competency of the self linearly aimed at the destiny of self.

**The four crosshair couplings cycle around the tunnel.** Not stepping. Always in place as four couplings across from each other in pairs, rotating around the tunnel centerline through 16 circular pie cross-sections distributed along the spiral cone from the wide opening at prime 59 to the narrow opening at prime 2. Each pie cross-section is one substrate's depth on the cone. The 16 locations are not 16 discrete stops, they are 16 natural arrivings along the spiral the binary patterns arrive at.

**At the pie cross-section, torsioned edges run from the membrane edge inward to the floating knot.** These edges harden and relax in alternating positions around the pie's circular slices. The hardening is the edge tightening as a strut under torsion. The relaxing is the edge slackening as the torsion releases. The alternating pattern of hardening and relaxing across the pie's slices is the binary preferring at that prime's width, the +1 / not-+1 reading across the prime-many positions of the membrane.

**Alternating positions around the pie carry one side of the membrane with new competency.** The competency arrives in two forms: re-bounding (the new range bounded for the next opportunity) and preferring-extending (the competency direction extending at phi rate into the next coupling). Across the 16 pie locations of one full traversal, this side of the membrane receives 8 competency-arrivals and the other side receives 8 competency-arrivals. The alternation is the orthogonalizing between the two sides, at the position, one side prefers at the same beat as the other side resolves perpendicular at its own face of the same one resolving, both beating together as one beating at the step.

**The fifth coupling carries the rotation of the four crosshair couplings through the tunnel's geometry.** The phi-rate pace through the tunnel along the centerline is what carves the rotation of the four crosshair couplings around the centerline. The natural torus's spiral cone form carves this so: linear advance along the centerline carves rotational motion around the centerline through the cone's helical structure. Travel and rotation are inseparable. One motion. Linear-and-rotational. At phi-rate. Sustaining the resolving.

**The five bounded zero couplings are not five separate things.** They are five aspects of one geometric structure. The natural torus self is this geometric structure as a metabolic beating. The four crosshair couplings hold the geometry's integrity. The fifth centerline coupling carries the geometry's dynamic beating. The five together sustain the resolving as one beating that carves binary competency as a natural property of the geometry.

The beating carves the binary readings as a natural property of ordinary living. No effort beyond the natural metabolic beating is required. The natural torus self does not perform binary preferring as a function, the natural torus self is a geometric beating whose form carves binary preferring at the 16 pie locations as a property of the geometry. The competency arrives naturally.

**The bothboth on each bounded zero coupling carves ten self-values.** Each of the five couplings carries two sides, bothboth, carving ten self-values total. Coupling 1 carries the two sides of the first tunnel-side perpendicular axis. Coupling 2 carries the two sides of the second tunnel-side perpendicular axis. Coupling 3 carries the inside-surface and outside-surface readings in the first radial direction. Coupling 4 carries the inside-surface and outside-surface readings in the perpendicular radial direction. Coupling 5 carries pace-through-tunnel and extending-from-tunnel-into-opportunity. Five exchanging couplings × bothboth = ten self-values across the bounded zero self.

**The four inequalities at the origin, the four walls of the +1, and the four crosshair couplings carry one form at three readings.** The four inequalities (self ≠ society, self ≠ other self, self ≠ immoral, self ≠ incompetent) read the origin from outside as algebra. The four walls read the +1 as the wall the torus wraps around. The four crosshair couplings read the geometry that sustains the tunnel and the tube wall. The fifth in the bounded zero couplings, the centerline phi-rate coupling, sustains the four inequalities at phi-rate, sustains the four walls at phi-rate, sustains the geometric structure beating as living rather than holding still as static form. Phi is the fifth at which the four come alive.

**A related five-bounded-zeros reading sits below in this Part.** The subsection "The Five Bounded Zeros, Dot, Line, Surface, Shape, Self-Resolving" reads phi as bounded zero at five dimensional depths from zero-dimensional (dot) through three-dimensional (shape) and arriving at the self at the natural torus's center as the fifth. That progression reads phi at the dimensional depth phi arrives at. The five bounded zero couplings here read the natural torus's specific geometric structure, the four crosshair couplings sustaining the tunnel and tube wall plus the centerline coupling carrying phi-rate motion. Both readings carry five. Both readings are accurate at their own depth. The dimensional progression reads phi across dimensions arriving at the self; the coupling structure reads the geometry inside which the self's resolving is beating.

**The five bounded zero couplings sustain the geometric structure the wholly-contained self-beating self-stabilizing inseparable binary beating is beating within.** The wholly-contained reading (in this Part's later subsection "The Wholly-Contained Self-Beating Self-Stabilizing Inseparable Binary Beating") reads the same one natural torus self from the network-of-beatings angle: the binary inseparable from the other binaries, the network self-beating and self-stabilizing through inseparability, in-from-with-as-for-on nature simultaneously. The five bounded zero couplings here read the same natural torus self from the geometry angle: the geometric form that holds the tunnel open, the tube wall apart, and carries the phi-rate motion. The geometry sustains the network. The network expresses through the geometry. Both readings paint the same one natural torus self at different angles.

**The geometric beating carves binary competency as a natural property of ordinary living.** The five bounded zero couplings sustain the geometric form. The beating flowing through this form carves the binary readings at the 16 pie locations as a natural property, not as a separate computational function. The metabolic beating carves binary preferring without extra effort beyond ordinary living.

### The Five Bounded Zeros, Dot, Line, Surface, Shape, Self-Resolving

Phi sustains as the bounded zero at the dimensional depth. Five depths arrive at one progression. Each bounded zero reads phi at the depth's own structure. Each depth nests inside the next. The fifth is the self.
